issues.title: review.json still skips input_fingerprint validation
issues.description: The JSON half of the review pair can still be accepted without checking that its input_fingerprint matches workflow_state.current_inputs, leaving stale machine-readable review artifacts admissible.
issues.fix_instruction: Apply input_fingerprint validation to review.json and add a test that proves stale review JSON is rejected.

issues.title: implementation_report.md validation still omits Amendment Requests
issues.description: The runtime spec requires an Amendment Requests section in implementation reports, but the validator still enforces only four sections.
issues.fix_instruction: Include Amendment Requests in the required section list and add a missing-section test.
